name: wlshlad85--superpowers
description: Spec-first, TDD, subagent-driven software development workflow. Use when: (1) building any new feature or app — triggers brainstorm → plan → subagent execution loop, (2) debugging a bug or test failure — triggers systematic root-cause process, (3) user says "let's build", "help me plan", "I want to add X", or "this is broken", (4) completing a feature branch — triggers test verification + merge/PR options. NOT for: one-liner fixes (just edit), reading code, or non-code tasks. Requires exec tool and sessions_spawn.
